entries.heading: We turn IT complexity into Digital Yours.

entries.heading: IT Infrastructure
entries.text: Enterprise networking, SD-WAN, routing & switching, wireless, firewall, VPN, ELV, CCTV and access control.

entries.heading: Data Center & Cloud
entries.text: Servers, HCI, virtualization, storage, Microsoft Azure/365, AWS, DigitalOcean, Google Workspace, backup & DR.

entries.heading: Digital Solutions
entries.text: Software development, ERP, CRM, AI solutions, system integration, SaaS, business intelligence & cybersecurity. About iTech Cambodia

entries.heading: A specialized IT consulting & implementation partner
entries.text: We deliver end-to-end technology services — enterprise networking, server & storage, virtualization, HCI, cloud computing, software development, system integration, business analytics, cybersecurity, managed IT services, ELV systems and modern data center design — for SMBs, large enterprises and government organizations across Cambodia. Our industry experience spans manufacturing, financial services, hospitality, healthcare, construction, education, retail, logistics, transportation, F&B, telecommunications and government agencies. More About Us Why iTech Cambodia

entries.heading: Who is iTech Cambodia?
entries.text: Your Trusted IT Infrastructure & Digital Transformation Partner — helping organizations across Cambodia modernize, secure, and scale their technology. Who We Are

entries.heading: A specialized IT consulting firm and technology implementation partner
entries.text: iTech Cambodia is a specialized IT consulting firm and technology implementation partner delivering comprehensive IT infrastructure and digital transformation solutions for small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs), large enterprises, and government organizations across Cambodia. Our team of experienced consultants and certified engineers provides end-to-end technology services, including enterprise network infrastructure, server and storage solutions, virtualization, hyper-converged infrastructure (HCI), cloud computing, microservices architecture, software development, system integration, reporting and business analytics, cybersecurity, managed IT services, ELV systems, and modern data cent

entries.heading: Vision
entries.text: To empower businesses with innovative, secure, and scalable technology solutions that accelerate digital transformation and sustainable growth.

entries.heading: Mission
entries.text: To provide world-class IT consulting, infrastructure, cybersecurity, cloud, software, and managed services that enable organizations to achieve operational excellence.

entries.heading: Core Value
entries.text: We are committed to delivering innovative, secure, and reliable technology solutions with integrity, excellence, and a customer-first approach. What Sets Us Apart

entries.heading: End-to-End Expertise
entries.text: From network design to cloud migration and custom software — one partner for your entire technology stack.

entries.heading: Secure & High-Availability
entries.text: Designed and managed to align with compliance requirements and business continuity objectives.

entries.heading: Certified Engineers
entries.text: Experienced consultants and certified engineers across networking, cloud, cybersecurity and software.

entries.heading: Customer-First Approach
entries.text: Long-term partnership and managed support that scales with your growth — not a one-time project. Industries We Serve

entries.heading: Trusted across every major sector in Cambodia
entries.text: Manufacturing Financial Services Hospitality Healthcare Construction Education Retail Logistics Transportation Restaurants & Coffee Chains Telecommunications Government Agencies
